entries.definition:
z-l-z-l to shake violently, to rock, to tremble, earthquake, to
agitate. Of this root, three forms occur six times in the Qurʾan:
زُلْزِلَ zulzila three times; زِلْزَال zilzāl twice and زَلْزَلَة zalzalatun

401
